title: Microsoft Is On Sale: 5 Reasons To Buy Now (NASDAQ:MSFT)
summary: Microsoft Corporation is rated a Strong Buy with a target of $600, representing a 52% upside. The company trades at a forward P/E of 21.5x, a 26% discount to its five-year average, despite strong EPS growth. Microsoft's AAA credit rating supports aggressive expansion in AI and data centers, while robust dividend growth and buybacks signal management confidence.

title: 3M expands optical interconnect manufacturing for AI data centers
summary: 3M announced plans to significantly expand its U.S. manufacturing capacity for Expanded Beam Optical (EBO) interconnect technology to meet the escalating demand from AI data centers. This expansion will more than double production, adding new equipment and space, to support high-speed data transmission crucial for AI computing. The investment targets hyperscalers and networking providers, underscoring the growing adoption of optical interconnects in high-density AI environments.

title: Madison Small Cap Fund’s Standout Performer: Ciena Corp (CIEN)
summary: The Madison Small Cap Fund's Q4 2025 investor letter highlights Ciena Corporation (CIEN) as a standout performer in its information technology holdings, noting its significant growth in the "cloud provider" business. Despite its strong fundamentals and becoming an AI capital spending beneficiary, the fund exited its position due to CIEN's market capitalization exceeding small-cap criteria and a full valuation, seeking better opportunities elsewhere.

title: Oracle Just Posted Its Best Quarter in 15 Years -- Here's Why 2026 Could Get Even Better
summary: Oracle recently reported its best quarter in 15 years, with adjusted revenue and EPS both growing at least 20%, driven by strong demand for cloud infrastructure and AI services. Despite a significant stock rebound after the earnings report, the stock is still down over 52% from its 52-week high due to concerns about high capital spending on new data centers impacting free cash flow. However, Oracle's management is optimizing its operating model for profitability and expects strong recurring revenue from these investments, suggesting potential for continued outperformance in 2026.

title: Bitmine Immersion Technologies (BMNR) Announces ETH Holdings Reach 4.596 Million Tokens, and Total Crypto and Total Cash Holdings of $11.5 Billion | Corporate
summary: Bitmine Immersion Technologies (BMNR) announced that its ETH holdings have reached 4.596 million tokens, contributing to a total of $11.5 billion in crypto and cash holdings. The company now owns 3.81% of the ETH token supply and has significantly increased its investment in Eightco ($ORBS) to expose investors to OpenAI equity. Bitmine also acquired 5,000 ETH from the Ethereum Foundation, demonstrating support for EF's operations and enabling it to fund core activities without open market sales, and continues to expand its staked ETH, with plans to launch its MAVAN staking solution in 2026.

title: Buy 3 S&P 500 Stocks Backed by Double-Digit Returns in the Past Month
summary: This article highlights three S&P 500 stocks—Dell Technologies (DELL), Keysight Technologies (KEYS), and Ciena Corp. (CIEN)—that have delivered double-digit returns in the past month. These companies are benefiting from strong demand in AI, digital transformation, and 5G, and each holds a favorable Zacks Rank. The piece details the growth drivers and financial outlook for each stock.

title: Junto Capital Management LP Takes Position in Flex Ltd. $FLEX
summary: Junto Capital Management LP has disclosed a new position in Flex Ltd. (NASDAQ:FLEX), acquiring 970,683 shares valued at approximately $56.27 million during the third quarter. This investment comes as Flex reported strong Q3 earnings, exceeding analyst expectations for both EPS and revenue, and issued optimistic guidance for FY2026. Despite recent insider stock sales by the COO and CFO, analysts largely maintain a "Buy" rating for Flex, with a consensus price target of $67.10.

title: Alphabet Inc. Class C Trade Ideas — LSX:A14Y6H
summary: This article compiles various trade ideas and technical analyses for Alphabet Inc. Class C (LSX:A14Y6H, NASDAQ:GOOGL, NASDAQ:GOOG) from multiple traders on TradingView. The analyses include discussions on bullish patterns like Cup and Handle, Morning Star candles, and breaking new highs, alongside some cautious perspectives on potential downtrends or resistance levels. The recent Google integration with Etherscan for Ethereum Name Service is highlighted as a significant development, contributing to a 1.95% surge in GOOG's stock price.

title: Smart Cities and Smart Spaces Market: Regaining Its Glory | Cisco Systems, Schneider Electric, Ericsson
summary: The Smart Cities and Smart Spaces Market is experiencing a period of renewed growth, driven by rapid urbanization, government initiatives, and the increasing integration of technologies like IoT and AI. Key players such as Siemens AG, IBM Corporation, and Cisco Systems are developing advanced digital solutions to enhance efficiency, sustainability, and quality of life in urban environments. The market report highlights trends in real-time monitoring and smart infrastructure, alongside opportunities in 5G network deployment and AI-powered analytics, particularly in emerging economies.

title: SPXT Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:SPXT

The article also includes technical analysis, seasonal trends, and answers frequently asked questions about ETFs and SPXT specifically.

title: BTIG Upgrades Upstart Holdings Inc (UPST) to Buy
summary: BTIG has upgraded Upstart Holdings Inc (UPST) to a Buy rating with a price target of $43.00, citing the company's recent bank application announcement which addresses key downside risks related to private credit exposure. The analyst believes Upstart's current share price does not reflect the potential upside from becoming a bank and is overly pricing in liquidity risk. The upgrade is also driven by significant potential cost savings, downside protection in liquidity-drying scenarios, and the expansion of the customer base through a unified regulatory framework.

title: Microsoft Corporation $MSFT Shares Sold by Crawford Investment Counsel Inc.

Microsoft exceeded Q3 earnings expectations with $4.14 EPS and $81.27 billion in revenue, and declared a quarterly dividend. title: Carlisle Companies Inc Stock Holds Ground as Materials Demand Signals Mixed—What Investors Should
summary: Carlisle Companies Inc. (ISIN: US1729081059) is trading near the midpoint of its 52-week range, facing mixed signals in construction and industrial markets. The company's diversified business model provides insulation from single-market downturns but also creates execution risks. Investors are watching for clarity on demand trends and margin performance, with the stock presenting a balanced risk-reward profile for those with a 12-18 month horizon.

title: Oracle Corp – Strength in AI Infrastructure
summary: Oracle Corp's 3Q26 revenue met expectations while PATMI exceeded them, driven by strong growth in Oracle Cloud revenue, particularly in AI infrastructure and multicloud partnerships. The company maintains a "BUY" rating with a target price of US$275 due to strong future contract visibility, expansion of its OCI data centers, and growth in Cloud Applications, despite a surge in CAPEX. The significant capital raised is expected to support future investments and boost free cash flow.

title: Is EPAM Systems' (EPAM) AI Pivot and Buyback Strategy Quietly Rewriting Its Investment Story?
summary: EPAM Systems recently announced a US$300 million accelerated share repurchase and reaffirmed its 2026 guidance, focusing on AI-native and foundational AI services, alongside deepening its integration with Microsoft Security. These actions aim to reposition EPAM as a high-value AI transformation partner and signal confidence in its long-term strategy amidst evolving market demands. Investors are now evaluating whether EPAM's AI pivot and buyback program can rebuild confidence and offset near-term risks like pricing pressures and competition in the AI services market.

title: Arista Networks, Inc. Trade Ideas — HAN:1170
summary: This article compiles various trade ideas and analyses for Arista Networks (HAN:1170, NYSE:ANET) from different traders on TradingView. It includes both bullish and bearish perspectives, discussing technical patterns, earnings impact, valuation, and potential price targets. The discussions highlight diverse strategies from options trading to swing trades, considering factors like head and shoulders patterns, trendlines, volume, and company fundamentals against market sentiment.

title: A Look At Check Point Software Technologies (CHKP) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Check Point Software Technologies (CHKP) has experienced recent share price weakness, with short-term returns under pressure despite positive multi-year shareholder returns. The article explores two valuation perspectives: a popular narrative suggesting the stock is 24.4% undervalued with a fair value of US$203.29, and a discounted cash flow (DCF) model indicating the shares are currently priced slightly above their estimated future cash flow value of US$151.47. Investors are advised to consider various factors, including analyst forecasts, potential execution risks around AI and platform shifts, and current market pricing relative to future cash flow projections.

title: A Pivotal Period for the iShares MSCI World ETF
summary: The iShares MSCI World ETF (URTH) is facing a significant period marked by the Federal Reserve's upcoming interest rate decision and a major overhaul of MSCI's core index methodology in May 2026. While a recent rebalancing showed a subtle net reduction in U.S. holdings, the more impactful changes related to free-float adjustments and rounding conventions are anticipated to cause greater portfolio turnover. Investors are advised to consider these converging influences as they are expected to transform the fund's composition beyond typical quarterly adjustments.

title: RR Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Richtech Robotics Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit First Filed by the Rosen Law Firm
summary: The Rosen Law Firm is reminding investors who purchased Richtech Robotics Inc. (NASDAQ: RR) securities between January 27, 2026, and January 29, 2026, of the April 3, 2026, lead plaintiff deadline in a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Richtech Robotics made false statements about having a collaborative and commercial relationship with Microsoft when it did not, leading to investor damages. The firm encourages affected investors to contact them to discuss joining the class action.

title: Is Microsoft Corporation (MSFT) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: This article summarizes a bullish thesis on Microsoft Corporation (MSFT), focusing on its strategic pivot towards enterprise AI governance with Agent 365. The thesis posits that Microsoft's ability to control access, identity, and permissions across any cloud will create a durable moat, similar to its past success with Active Directory. Key indicators for continued success include widespread enterprise adoption of Agent 365, sustained non-OpenAI backlog growth, and significant M365 Copilot penetration.

title: Morgan Stanley Cuts PT on Choice Hotels International (CHH) to $83 From $91 – Here’s Why
summary: Morgan Stanley has lowered its price target for Choice Hotels International (CHH) to $83 from $91, maintaining an Underweight rating due to concerns about the US-Israel conflict with Iran, despite lodging companies generally surpassing Q4 estimates. Barclays, however, uplifted its price target to $101 from $98, citing potentially conservative RevPAR guidance from CHH. The article also includes promotional material for an AI stock investment, suggesting it has greater potential than CHH.

title: Six trends set to reshape talent acquisition, Korn Ferry projects
summary: Korn Ferry predicts a significant transformation in talent acquisition by 2026, primarily due to advances in AI and the growing demand for critical thinking skills. The firm warns of future talent shortages caused by early-career workforce reductions and advises organizations to adapt their hiring strategies. These projections highlight ongoing challenges in workforce transformation and the need to balance automation with essential human cognitive abilities.

title: Elastic NV Stock (ISIN: NL0012650360) Faces Pressure Amid Cloud Competition and Growth Slowdown
summary: Elastic NV stock is experiencing pressure due to decelerating growth in the cloud software sector and increased competition from major cloud providers like Amazon and Microsoft. Despite strong recurring revenue and customer retention, the company's overall revenue growth has slowed, prompting investors to scrutinize its ability to maintain operational leverage. Elastic NV is focusing on AI-driven search capabilities as a key growth driver, but faces execution risks and market headwinds in transitioning self-hosted deployments to the cloud.

title: Freshpet, Inc. (FRPT) Price Target Raised to $98 at DA Davidson on Q4 Review
summary: DA Davidson raised its price target for Freshpet, Inc. (FRPT) to $98 from $80, maintaining a Buy rating after the company's Q4 2025 results. The firm highlighted FRPT's manufacturing capabilities as a strategic advantage for margin improvement. Freshpet reported strong financial results for Q4 and the full year 2025, with increased net sales and adjusted EBITDA, and provided positive guidance for 2026.

title: Citizens Lifts PT on Hilton Grand Vacations Inc. (HGV) to $55 From $50 – Here’s Why
summary: Citizens has increased its price target for Hilton Grand Vacations Inc. (HGV) from $50 to $55, maintaining an Outperform rating due to expected benefits from financial engineering, including a substantial share buyback. Jefferies also raised its price target to $50 from $46, noting the stability of timeshares and a supportive environment for HGV's acquisitions and recovery in Hawaii. The article also includes a promotional section for an AI stock tip, unrelated to HGV.

title: Barclays Lifts PT on EOG Resources (EOG) to $140 From $133 – Here’s Why
summary: Barclays has increased its price target for EOG Resources (EOG) to $140 from $133, maintaining an Equal Weight rating. The firm believes the market is underappreciating the cash flow benefits for the exploration and production group, despite a potentially short-lived oil price spike. UBS also raised its price target to $158, citing potential for higher oil and natural gas prices due to Middle East conflict and its positive impact on free cash flow for oil and gas producers.

title: Why EQT Corporation (EQT) is One of the Most Undervalued Energy Stocks to Buy Now
summary: EQT Corporation (NYSE: EQT) is highlighted as one of the most undervalued energy stocks currently. Barclays and UBS have both issued positive ratings, with price target increases, citing underappreciated cash flow tailwinds and attractive risk/reward in the energy sector, particularly due to geopolitical risks affecting oil and natural gas prices. The article suggests that prolonged Middle East conflict and potential Qatar gas supply disruptions could further boost oil and natural gas prices, benefiting companies like EQT.

title: Invesco Ltd. (IVZ) Reports Preliminary Assets Under Management of $2.26 Trillion for February
summary: Invesco Ltd. (IVZ) announced preliminary assets under management of $2.26 trillion for February 2026, marking a 1.2% increase from the previous month. The growth was driven by $4.7 billion in net long-term inflows and $13.5 billion in money market net inflows. This report follows a recent price target reduction for IVZ by Evercore ISI analyst Glenn Schorr, though the company had previously beaten Q4 earnings and revenue estimates.

title: Assessing Archrock (AROC) Valuation After Strong Multi Year Returns And Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Archrock (AROC) has shown strong returns over the past year, prompting an assessment of its current valuation. While the company is considered undervalued based on cash flow visibility and improved operational stability, investors are advised to consider whether future growth is already priced in. The valuation narrative points to a fair value of $36.67 per share, slightly above its current trading price, driven by revenue gains and wider margins, but also highlights risks related to U.S. natural gas demand and potential regulatory shifts.

title: Nvidia, Apple headlines ignite volume surge in USPX ETF
summary: The Franklin LibertyQ Global Equity ETF (USPX) is experiencing a significant surge in trading volume, 23 times its daily average, driven by recent news concerning its major holdings. The ETF is heavily invested in mega-cap tech companies like Nvidia, Apple, and Microsoft, all of which are currently in the spotlight due to upcoming events or recent developments. Nvidia's GTC conference, Apple's regulatory scrutiny in China, and Microsoft's security bug are among the key factors influencing investor interest and the ETF's unusual activity.
